query: SELECT id, title, category, notes, photos FROM map_pins WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%well%' OR LOWER(notes) LIKE '%well%' ORDER BY id DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user WBfVgvvEUxL2ZXR.root --database 5Wh7ynUieoKvKRb4ttPNaL --execute SELECT id, title, category, notes, photos FROM map_pins WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%well%' OR LOWER(notes) LIKE '%well%' ORDER BY id DESC;

rows.title: pipes in front of shop
rows.notes: Excavation in front of Lower Shop, July 2021. Multiple pipe runs exposed: irrigation line, potable water feed from 100K gallon tank, and potable water line running up to windmill area (Well #1). Purple primer visible on PVC joints. Kubota mini-excavator used.

rows.title: Water Manifold — South of Lower Shop (East)
rows.notes: Eastern excavation, 14 ft off southern wall of Lower Shop. Contains: (1) main shutoff valve — shuts off water from 100K tank to entire property; (2) 1" connection — pipe from windmill well (Well #1) to tank fill; (3) two lines in middle — capped off (abandoned).
